artifacts.summary: Eliminated 2 of 3 axioms using T-axiom proof strategy; third axiom blocked due to Lindenbaum extension complexity

partial_progress.details: Phases 1-3 completed. Phase 4 blocked: predecessor_f_step_axiom requires proof machinery for Lindenbaum extension properties not available in current infrastructure.

review_reason: Phase 4 blocked: predecessor_f_step_axiom requires more sophisticated proof machinery. Documented with technical analysis.
